text: Thousands of the world's best sales teams are generating billions in pipeline with Nooks.
Today, I'm excited to announce our biggest evolution yet, the Agent Workspace, for Intelligent Outbound.
Most sales teams still run on legacy sequencing tools like Outreach and Salesloft, built for a world where most tasks were manual.
Our Agent Workspace has all the core features of these legacy tools, sequences, tasks, email deliverability,
but reimagined to combine the best of human judgment with AI execution.
Every day, Nooks agents monitor your accounts, pulling deep research from your own data, linked in, and the web.
They turn that research into actionable buying signals.
Here, an agent discovered an upcoming competitive renewal, surfaced from a previous call recording.
It recommends prospects by analyzing prior conversations and mapping the org,
enriches them with a contact data waterfall across dozens of providers,
and suggests sequences with personalized emails that you can edit and approve before sending.
Finally, you can push these leads to our AI dialer for efficient, live conversations,
enabled by AI research and real-time battle cards.
As reps give feedback, like approving prospects and editing emails,
agents learn to be more autonomous over time.
In our AI studio, you can orchestrate agents into outbound plays that react real-time to the market.
From a VP joining a new company, to a new product launch,
agents detect and trigger the right message at the right time.
Until today, this required dozens of disconnected tools,
but Nooks consolidates everything into one unified workspace.
And while others are using AI to replace people,
we believe your best reps, working together with AI, can push the boundaries of what's possible.
Leading sales teams from sophisticated enterprises to the fastest-growing startups
have already made the switch and seen incredible results.
Come join them and enter the era of intelligent outbound.
Thank you.
